narrative.narrative: Extreme fear is gripping the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 25, yet stablecoin growth is quietly accelerating—a classic divergence that signals smart money accumulation during the panic. This setup mirrors the August 2024 bottom with nearly 80% similarity, where identical fear levels and stablecoin inflows preceded a sharp relief rally. The market is pricing in maximum pessimism, but the liquidity foundation is being laid beneath the surface.
narrative.headline: Fear Peaks While Smart Money Accumulates
